title: agrimonia nipponica var. nipponica
intro: Agrimonia nipponica var. nipponica is a perennial plant species native to Japan, belonging to the Rosaceae family, commonly known as the agrimony or sticklebur. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Agrimonia nipponica var. nipponica include reducing menstrual cramps, relieving fever and sore throats, and supporting digestive health. Traditional herbal preparations of Agrimonia nipponica var. nipponica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
